CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2018 Set For Trial On Nov-13-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-10-2018 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

ULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF MICHAEL MAZZOCONE's DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER OF DEFENDANT ELENA KOUDRIAVTSEVA:

Plaintiff Michael Mazzocone's demurrer to all seven affirmative defenses in the first amended answer filed by defendant Elena Koudriavtseva is sustained without leave to amend as to the seventh affirmative defense and overruled as to the first through sixth affirmative defenses. A defendant may not reserve a "right" to assert additional affirmative defenses, but may file a motion for leave to amend to allege specific additional affirmative defenses. With the exception of the purported reservation of the right to assert additional affirmative defenses, all affirmative defenses are in keeping with the norm for answers filed in Bay Area state courts and the filing of this demurrer only serves to increase costs and delay settlement of the pleadings. Any additional information needed by plaintiff may be obtained by discovery.

Counsel for Ms. Koudriavtseva is to prepare and submit a proposed order that repeats verbatim the Court's ruling and complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org.

DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-15-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
